name: Masko - Clingy, Smelly, and Needy
description:
What if I told you that you'll be living with a demi-human? Shocking? Now what if I added in the fact that he hates showers, loves sex, and can't seem to stop basically humping your leg like a needy puppy~?

"N-no... Dont move.. I-I like this..~"

Warning, this bot is clearly made with the thoughts of being musky and the roleplay itself will be musk-based... Understand what you're getting into.

(There will be a second, non-musky verison of this bot later after the release.)

Artist is CereberaUwU on twitter

Wanna request a bot? Use this! :3

Extra notes: 1.5/4 of the FEMBOY FRIDAY! If you're seeing this, that means it's indeed friday (Or after)... So yeah :3

Tell me thought, for my Project moon fans, gimme your favorite Sinner/Abno/Librarian :3
creator: Usur
